name: Lotus
description: Lotus petals fanning in three, re-tinting petal by petal on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 36%; top: 14%; width: 28%; height: 76%; border-radius: 50% 50% 50% 50% / 70% 70% 30% 30%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 14%; top: 22%; width: 28%; height: 64%; border-radius: 50% 50% 50% 50% / 70% 70% 30% 30%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transform: rotate(-32deg); transform: rotate(-32deg); transform-origin: bottom; -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
